title: An Authentic Narrative of Some Remarkable and Interesting Particulars in the Life of John Newton
edition_note: Modern facsimile reprint edition (reproducing the 19th-century ninth edition); original work first published 1764, predates the ISBN system.

title: Thoughts Upon the African Slave Trade
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Forgotten Books Classic Reprint); original pamphlet published 1788, predates the ISBN system.

title: Memories of Eighty Years
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original autobiography published 1906 by James H. Earle & Company, predates the ISBN system.

title: Grace Abounding to the Chief of Sinners
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Penguin Classics); original work published 1666, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Holy War
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original work published 1682, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Pilgrim's Progress
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Penguin Classics, 2009); original work published 1678, predates the ISBN system.

title: Logic: Or, the Right Use of Reason in the Inquiry After Truth
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Soli Deo Gloria Publications); original work published 1724, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Improvement of the Mind
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original work published 1741, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Task
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (The Perfect Library, 2015); original work published 1785, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Historic Proof of the Doctrinal Calvinism of the Church of England
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Forgotten Books Classic Reprint, Vol. 1 of the original 2-volume work); original work published 1774, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Everlasting Righteousness; Or, How Shall Man Be Just With God?
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Banner of Truth, 1993); original work written/published 1874, predates the ISBN system.

title: George Whitefield's Journals
edition_note: Modern combined edition (Banner of Truth, 1978), collecting journals Whitefield published serially 1738-1741 during his lifetime, predating the ISBN system.

title: A Practical View of the Prevailing Religious System of Professed Christians in the Higher and Middle Classes of This Country Contrasted With Real Christianity
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Hendrickson Christian Classics, 2006); original work published 1797, predates the ISBN system.

title: A Narrative of Some of the Lord's Dealings with George Müller, Written by Himself (Autobiography of George Müller)
edition_note: Modern combined/abridged reprint edition (Whitaker House, 1996), compiled from Müller's own diary-based narrative, first published in parts beginning 1837 and expanded through his lifetime; predates the ISBN system.

title: A Grief Observed
edition_note: Current standard edition (Harper & Row / HarperOne); original work first published 1961 under the pseudonym N. W. Clerk, predating the modern ISBN system.

title: Mere Christianity
edition_note: Current standard edition (HarperOne, 2001); compiled from BBC radio talks and first published as a complete book in 1952 by Geoffrey Bles (UK) / Macmillan (US), predating the modern ISBN system.

title: Surprised by Joy: The Shape of My Early Life
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (HarperOne, 2017); original work first published 1955 by Geoffrey Bles, predating the modern ISBN system.

title: The Four Loves
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (HarperOne, 2017); original work first published 1960 by Geoffrey Bles, predating the modern ISBN system.

title: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
edition_note: Modern standard edition (HarperCollins); original work first published 1950 by Geoffrey Bles, predating the modern ISBN system.

title: The Problem of Pain
edition_note: Current standard edition (HarperOne); original work first published 1940, predating the modern ISBN system.

title: The Screwtape Letters
edition_note: Current standard edition (HarperOne); original work first published 1942 by Geoffrey Bles, predating the modern ISBN system.

title: A Retrospect
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original work published 1894, predates the ISBN system.

title: China's Spiritual Need and Claims
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Cambridge Library Collection, 2011), reproducing the seventh edition (1887); original work first published 1865, predates the ISBN system.

title: Missionary Travels and Researches in South Africa
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original work published 1857 by John Murray, predates the ISBN system.

title: Narrative of an Expedition to the Zambesi and Its Tributaries
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Duckworth, 2001); original work published 1865 by John Murray (co-authored with Charles Livingstone), predates the ISBN system.

title: Gold Cord: The Story of a Fellowship
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (CLC Publications, 1982); original work published 1932, predates the ISBN system.

title: If
edition_note: Current CLC Publications edition; original work published 1938 by SPCK, London, predates the ISBN system.

title: Things As They Are: Mission Work in Southern India
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original work published 1903 by Morgan and Scott, London, predates the ISBN system.

title: Toward Jerusalem
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (CLC Publications, 1988); original work published 1936 by SPCK, London, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Spiritual Man
edition_note: Modern combined 3-volumes-in-1 reprint edition (Christian Fellowship Publishers); original three-volume work first published 1928 and, unlike most of Nee's other titles, written by hand by Nee himself rather than compiled from spoken messages by others; predates the ISBN system.

title: At the Master's Feet
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original work first published 1922 by Fleming H. Revell Company, translated from Singh's original Urdu manuscript; predates the ISBN system.

title: With and Without Christ
edition_note: No verifiable ISBN found for any print edition; original work first published 1929 by the Christian Literature Society, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Obedience of a Christian Man
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Penguin Classics, 2000, ed. David Daniell); original work published 1528, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Church (De Ecclesia)
edition_note: No verifiable ISBN found; the standard English translation is by David S. Schaff, first published 1915 by Charles Scribner's Sons, with a later reprint by Greenwood Press (1974). The original Latin treatise, written 1413, long predates the ISBN system.

title: Tortured for Christ
edition_note: Current standard edition (Living Sacrifice Book Co.); original work first published 1967, just before the modern ISBN system was introduced, so this ISBN reflects a later print run rather than the true first printing.

title: An Enquiry into the Obligations of Christians to Use Means for the Conversion of the Heathens
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Revival Press, 2019); original work published 1792, predates the ISBN system.

title: Parables of the Cross
edition_note: Modern facsimile reprint edition (Lilias Trotter Legacy); original work first published 1890 by Marshall Brothers, London, predates the ISBN system.

title: Christian Devotedness
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Emmaus Worldwide); original work published in London in 1829, predates the ISBN system. Also freely available as a Project Gutenberg ebook.

title: The Sceptical Chymist
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Dover Publications, Classics in Chemistry series, 2003); original work published 1661, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Wonders of Prayer: A Record of Well Authenticated and Wonderful Answers to Prayer
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Franklin Classics); original work published by Fleming H. Revell in 1885, predates the ISBN system. Published anonymously/under Whittle's editorship as a collector of answered-prayer accounts.

title: Kept for the Master's Use
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Kregel Publications, 1989); original work published 1879, predates the ISBN system.

title: All Things for Good
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Banner of Truth, 2021); originally published 1663 under the title 'A Divine Cordial', predates the ISBN system.

title: The Doctrine of Repentance
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Banner of Truth, Puritan Paperbacks series); original work published 1668, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Hiding Place
edition_note: Written with John and Elizabeth Sherrill. Original edition (Chosen Books, 1971).

title: Tramp for the Lord
edition_note: Written with Jamie Buckingham. Original edition (Fleming H. Revell, 1974).

title: The Disciplines of the Christian Life
edition_note: Written by Liddell during his internment in China in the early 1940s; first published posthumously in 1985 (Triangle/SPCK), decades after his 1945 death.

title: A Chance to Die: The Life and Legacy of Amy Carmichael
Passion and Purity: Learning to Bring Your Love Life Under God's Control
Shadow of the Almighty: The Life and Testament of Jim Elliot
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (HarperOne); original work published 1958 (Harper & Row), predates the ISBN system.

title: Through Gates of Splendor
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Tyndale House Publishers); original work published 1957 (Harper & Row), predates the ISBN system.

title: God's Smuggler
edition_note: Written with John and Elizabeth Sherrill. Original edition (New American Library, 1967).

title: A Grammar of the Burmese Language
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Legare Street Press); Judson completed the original grammar in 1816, predating the ISBN system. Widely available reprints reproduce the expanded posthumous 1883 American Baptist Mission Press printing.

title: A Plain Account of Christian Perfection
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Beacon Hill Press); original work published 1766, predates the ISBN system.

title: Explanatory Notes Upon the New Testament
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Hendrickson/Epworth Press, 1986); original work published 1754-1755, predates the ISBN system.

title: A Method for Prayer
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Christian Heritage/Christian Focus Publications); original work published 1710, predates the ISBN system.

title: Matthew Henry's Commentary on the Whole Bible
edition_note: Modern one-volume reprint edition (Hendrickson Publishers, 1991); original six-volume work published 1708-1710 (Old Testament and Gospels/Acts completed by Henry himself; Romans-Revelation completed by other ministers after his 1714 death, based partly on his notes), predates the ISBN system.

title: All of Grace
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Moody Publishers, 1974); original work published 1894, predates the ISBN system.

title: Morning and Evening
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Hendrickson Publishers); original work published 1866, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Journal of David Brainerd
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Banner of Truth, 'Diary and Journal of David Brainerd'); original journal published in two parts in 1746 (Mirabilia Dei inter Indicos) during Brainerd's lifetime, predates the ISBN system. Distinct from Jonathan Edwards's posthumous 'An Account of the Life of the Late Reverend Mr. David Brainerd' (1749), which is Edwards's own compiled biography, not Brainerd's own book.

title: Gladys Aylward: The Little Woman
edition_note: As-told-to autobiography, written down by Christine Hunter from Aylward's own recounted stories; billed as Aylward's authorized account of her own life. Original edition (Moody Press, 1970).

title: The Chocolate Soldier, or, Heroism: The Lost Chord of Christianity
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (deeperChristian Classics/Ellerslie Press, 2016); original work published 1912, predates the ISBN system.

title: In Darkest England and the Way Out
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (The Salvation Army, 1984); original work published 1890, predates the ISBN system.

title: Luther's Small Catechism
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Concordia Publishing House); original work published 1529, predates the ISBN system.

title: On the Freedom of a Christian
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Hackett Classics, 'On the Freedom of a Christian: With Related Texts'); original work published 1520, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Bondage of the Will
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Fleming H. Revell, trans. J. I. Packer & O. R. Johnston); original work (De servo arbitrio) published 1525, predates the ISBN system.

title: Institutes of the Christian Religion
edition_note: Modern scholarly edition (Westminster John Knox Press, Library of Christian Classics, ed. John T. McNeill, trans. Ford Lewis Battles, 1960); final Latin edition of Calvin's original work published 1559 (first edition 1536), predates the ISBN system.

title: Synopsis of the Books of the Bible
edition_note: Modern reprint of the 5-volume set (Believers Bookshelf); originally serialized 1857–1867, predates the ISBN system.

title: Narrative of a Mission of Inquiry to the Jews from the Church of Scotland in 1839
edition_note: Co-authored with Andrew Bonar, based on their 1839 deputation to Palestine and the Near East on behalf of the Church of Scotland. Original 1842 edition predates the ISBN system; no verifiable ISBN was found for any reprint.

title: Stri Dharma Niti (Morals for Women)
edition_note: Original Marathi work published 1882, predates the ISBN system; no verifiable modern edition or ISBN was found.

title: The High-Caste Hindu Woman
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Mint Editions, 2021); original work published 1887, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Peoples of the United States
edition_note: Original work written in Marathi (1889); ISBN is for Meera Kosambi's annotated English translation, published as 'Pandita Ramabai's American Encounter: The Peoples of the United States (1889)' (Indiana University Press).

title: Forty Mountain Peaks: A Study of Isaiah Chapters 24-66
edition_note: No verifiable ISBN was found for any edition of this ministry title.

title: Salt and Light
edition_note: No verifiable ISBN was found for any edition of this ministry title.

title: Life Together
edition_note: English translation edition (HarperOne); original German work 'Gemeinsames Leben' published 1939, predates the ISBN system.

title: Sanctorum Communio
edition_note: English translation edition (Dietrich Bonhoeffer Works, Vol. 1, Fortress Press); original German doctoral dissertation completed 1927, first published 1930.

title: The Cost of Discipleship
edition_note: English translation edition (Touchstone/Simon & Schuster); original German work 'Nachfolge' published 1937, predates the ISBN system.

title: A Step Further
edition_note: Co-authored with Steve Estes.

title: Joni: An Unforgettable Story
edition_note: Written with Joe Musser.

title: Secret Power
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Whitaker House, 2011); original work published 1881, predates the ISBN system.

title: An Expository Dictionary of New Testament Words
edition_note: Modern combined edition (Vine's Complete Expository Dictionary of Old and New Testament Words, Thomas Nelson, 1996); original 4-volume New Testament work published 1939–1941, predates the ISBN system.

title: Strong's Exhaustive Concordance of the Bible
edition_note: Modern updated edition (Hendrickson Academic, 2009); original work published 1890, predates the ISBN system.

title: Cruden's Complete Concordance to the Old and New Testaments
edition_note: Modern edition (published as Cruden's Unabridged Concordance, Baker Books); original work published 1737, predates the ISBN system.

title: Believer's Bible Commentary
edition_note: Current second edition (Thomas Nelson, 2016); original first edition published 1989/1990.

title: True Discipleship
edition_note: Original Walterick Publishers edition, 1975.

title: Holiness: The False and the True
edition_note: Modern print-on-demand reprint (CreateSpace, 2014); original work published 1947, predates the ISBN system.

title: Random Reminiscences from Fifty Years of Ministry
edition_note: Original edition published by Loizeaux Brothers, New York, 1939, predates the ISBN system; no verifiable ISBN was found for any reprint edition.

title: On the Truth of Holy Scripture
edition_note: Modern scholarly translation (De Veritate Sacrae Scripturae, trans. Ian Christopher Levy, Medieval Institute Publications, 2001); original Latin work is medieval and predates the ISBN system.

title: Trialogus
edition_note: Modern scholarly translation (Wyclif: Trialogus, trans. Stephen E. Lahey, Cambridge University Press, 2012); original Latin work is medieval and predates the ISBN system.

title: Hours of Sorrow Cheered and Comforted
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Forgotten Books Classic Reprint, 2018); original work published 1836, predates the ISBN system.

title: Just As I Am: The Autobiography of Billy Graham
Peace with God
edition_note: Catalogued ISBN for the original Doubleday edition; the ISBN system itself was not introduced until 1970, so this identifier was assigned retroactively by booksellers/libraries.

title: Freedom of the Will
edition_note: Modern critical edition (The Works of Jonathan Edwards, Vol. 1, Yale University Press, 1957); original work published 1754, predates the ISBN system.

title: A Treatise Concerning Religious Affections
edition_note: Modern edition (Banner of Truth); original work published 1746, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Life of David Brainerd
edition_note: Modern edition (Banner of Truth, 2023); original work (Edwards's edited abridgment of Brainerd's diary) published 1749, predates the ISBN system.

title: John G. Paton: Missionary to the New Hebrides, An Autobiography
edition_note: Modern edition (Banner of Truth, 2013); original two-part autobiography published 1889, predates the ISBN system.

title: Lectures on Calvinism
edition_note: Modern edition (Eerdmans); the six Stone Lectures were delivered at Princeton in 1898 and first published in 1899, predating the ISBN system.

title: The Work of the Holy Spirit
edition_note: Modern edition (Eerdmans, 1941 reprint); original Dutch work 'Het Werk van den Heiligen Geest' published 1888–1889, English translation 1900, predates the ISBN system.

title: By Searching
edition_note: Original OMF (China Inland Mission) edition, 1957.

title: Green Leaf in Drought
edition_note: Modern OMF International edition; recounts the escape of the last China Inland Mission missionaries from Communist China.

title: How Should We Then Live? The Rise and Decline of Western Thought and Culture
edition_note: Original edition published by Fleming H. Revell, 1976; no verifiable ISBN was found via search for the original or a specific current edition.

title: The Apostolic Preaching of the Cross
The Gospel According to John
edition_note: Revised edition (NICNT, Eerdmans, 1995); original edition first published 1971.

title: Give Me This Mountain
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Christian Focus, 2012); original 1966 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: Living Sacrifice
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Christian Focus, retitled 'Living Sacrifice: Willing to be Whittled as an Arrow'); original 1979 publication (Christian Literature Crusade) predates this ISBN.

title: The New Testament Documents: Are They Reliable?
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Eerdmans); original 1943 publication (Inter-Varsity Fellowship) predates the ISBN system.

title: Paul: Apostle of the Heart Set Free
edition_note: ISBN shown is for the Eerdmans (US) hardcover edition; the original 1977 UK edition was published by Paternoster Press under the title 'Paul: Apostle of the Free Spirit'.

title: Preaching and Preachers
edition_note: ISBN shown is for the 40th-anniversary Zondervan edition; original 1971 Hodder & Stoughton edition ISBN not independently confirmed. Published during Lloyd-Jones's lifetime, based on his own 1969 lectures at Westminster Theological Seminary.

title: Studies in the Sermon on the Mount
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Eerdmans, two-volume set); original 1959-60 publication predates the ISBN system. Adapted by Lloyd-Jones himself for publication from sermons preached 1950-51 at Westminster Chapel — distinct from the many multi-volume sermon series compiled and published posthumously after his 1981 death.

title: The Knowledge of the Holy
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (HarperOne, 1978 paperback reissue, still in print); original 1961 publication (Harper & Row) predates general ISBN adoption for this title.

title: The Pursuit of God
edition_note: Modern updated reprint edition (WingSpread Publishers); original 1948 publication (Christian Publications) predates the ISBN system.

title: Baffled to Fight Better
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Discovery House, 1990); original December 1917 publication (Nile Mission Press, Cairo) predates the ISBN system. Chambers proofread this manuscript himself before his November 1917 death, making it the only book-length prose work he personally prepared for publication — his other well-known titles, including 'My Utmost for His Highest', were posthumously compiled by his widow, Biddy Chambers, from shorthand notes of his talks, and are excluded here for that reason.

title: From Pearl Harbor to Calvary
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (eChristian Books, 2011); original 1953 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: A Visit to the Indians on the Frontiers of Chile
edition_note: No ISBN found and no confirmed modern reprint edition located; original 1840 publication (Seeley, Burnside & Seeley, London).

title: Lex, Rex: The Law and the Prince
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Canon Press, 2020, with introduction by Douglas Wilson); original 1644 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: Horae Homileticae
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Forgotten Books) of a single volume from the original 21-volume set of sermon outlines/commentary on the whole Bible, personally compiled by Simeon and issued serially from 1819, with a complete revised edition in 1832-33; predates the ISBN system.

title: Holiness: Its Nature, Hindrances, Difficulties, and Roots
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Banner of Truth, enlarged edition); original 1877 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: Practical Religion
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Banner of Truth); original 1878 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: Bible Characters
edition_note: Modern single-volume reprint edition (Christian Heritage, 2001) compiling the original six-volume series published 1896-1902; predates the ISBN system.

title: Bunyan Characters
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Wipf and Stock, 2000) of the first series; original series published 1893-1908 in four volumes (Fleming H. Revell Co.), predating the ISBN system.

title: Ecce Deus: Essays on the Life and Doctrine of Jesus Christ
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Forgotten Books, Classic Reprint series); original 1867/1868 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: How to Pray
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Whitaker House); original 1900 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: The Person and Work of the Holy Spirit
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Zondervan); original 1910 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: Can the Old Faith Live with the New? Or, the Problem of Evolution and Revelation
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original 1885 publication (William Blackwood, Edinburgh) predates the ISBN system.

title: Devil at My Heels
edition_note: This is the 2003 memoir co-authored with David Rensin — a distinct work in content from Zamperini's earlier 1956 memoir of the same title, co-authored with Helen Itria, which predates the ISBN system.

title: Born Again
edition_note: ISBN shown is for a current Chosen Books print edition; the exact ISBN of the original 1976 first printing was not independently confirmed.

title: Loving God
edition_note: ISBN shown is for a current Zondervan print edition; the exact ISBN of the original 1983 first printing was not independently confirmed.

title: Run Baby Run
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Bridge-Logos); original 1968 publication (Logos International, co-authored with Jamie Buckingham) predates the ISBN system.

title: I Dared to Call Him Father
edition_note: ISBN shown is for the original Chosen Books 1978 hardcover edition (co-authored with Richard H. Schneider).

title: The First Blast of the Trumpet Against the Monstrous Regiment of Women
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Kessinger Publishing, Legacy Reprints); original 1558 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: The History of the Reformation in Scotland
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Banner of Truth); written by Knox 1559-1566 but not published in full until after his 1572 death (1586-87 first complete printing); predates the ISBN system.

title: The Gospel Worthy of All Acceptation
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Gale/Sabin Americana reprint of the 1801 second edition); original 1785 publication predates the ISBN system.

title: My Life and Sacred Songs
edition_note: ISBN belongs to an AMS Press reprint of the fuller 1907 US edition (titled 'My Life and the Story of the Gospel Hymns and of Sacred Songs and Solos'); the original 1906 UK edition (Hodder & Stoughton/Morgan & Scott) predates the ISBN system. This is Sankey's prose memoir, distinct from any hymnal or hymn collection.

title: Everyone's a Theologian: An Introduction to Systematic Theology
Christianity and Liberalism
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Eerdmans, new ed. with foreword by Carl Trueman, 2009); original work published 1923, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Virgin Birth of Christ
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Baker Books); original work published 1930, predates the ISBN system.

title: What Is Faith?
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Eerdmans, 1946 reprint still in print); original work published 1925 by Macmillan, predates the ISBN system.

title: A Book of Sermons
edition_note: Original 1932 self-published edition, per WorldCat; predates the ISBN system (est. 1970). A print-on-demand facsimile exists but no verifiable ISBN was found for it.

title: Then Sings My Soul
edition_note: Original 1968 F.H. Revell edition; no verifiable ISBN was found despite the ISBN system existing by this date (some early Revell printings were not assigned/catalogued with one).

title: The Pelican Island, and Other Poems
edition_note: Modern facsimile reprint edition (Kessinger Publishing, 2008); original work published 1828, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Rise and Progress of Religion in the Soul
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Soli Deo Gloria Publications, 2005); original work published 1745, predates the ISBN system.

title: Commentary on True and False Religion
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Wipf & Stock, Latin Works and Correspondence of Huldreich Zwingli series, 2015); original work published 1525, predates the ISBN system.

title: A Defence of the True and Catholic Doctrine of the Sacrament of the Body and Blood of Christ
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Wipf & Stock, 2004); original work published 1550, predates the ISBN system. The first full-length book published under Cranmer's own name.

title: Foundation of Christian Doctrine
edition_note: Original work (Dat Fundament des Christelycken leers, 1539-40) predates the ISBN system; ISBN given is for the modern standard scholarly edition, The Complete Writings of Menno Simons (Herald Press, ed. J.C. Wenger, trans. Leonard Verduin), which contains this work in full alongside Menno's other tracts.

title: Meditations on the Cross
edition_note: Original 1935 edition (Willett, Clark and Company, trans. Helen Topping and Marion R. Draper); predates the ISBN system, and no verifiable ISBN was found for any modern reprint.

title: Songs from the Slums
edition_note: Modern reprint edition; original work published 1935 by Cokesbury Press (Nashville), predates the ISBN system.

title: A Grammar of the Yoruba Language
edition_note: Original 1843 edition; predates the ISBN system. Later editions and reprints exist but title/date attributions are inconsistent across booksellers (some list a substantially revised 1852 edition under the same title), so no specific reprint ISBN is claimed here.

title: The Life of Rev. William James Hall, M.D.: Medical Missionary to the Slums of New York, Pioneer Missionary to Pyong Yang, Korea
edition_note: Modern print-on-demand facsimile reprint (Forgotten Books); original work published 1897 by Press of Eaton & Mains, predates the ISBN system. A biography of her husband written by Hall herself, not a posthumous compilation by another party.

title: Abide in Christ
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Whitaker House, 2002); original work published 1895, predates the ISBN system.

title: With Christ in the School of Prayer
edition_note: Modern reprint edition (Whitaker House mass-market paperback); original work published 1885, predates the ISBN system.

title: My Life: A Guided Tour (The Autobiography of Kenneth N. Taylor)
Sing!: How Worship Transforms Your Life, Family, and Church
edition_note: Co-authored with Kristyn Getty.

title: Sing!: How Worship Transforms Your Life, Family, and Church
edition_note: Co-authored with Keith Getty.

title: The Pastor's Wife
edition_note: Original 1970 Hodder & Stoughton edition, prepared with editor Charles Foley from Wurmbrand's own testimony.

title: God's Undertaker: Has Science Buried God?
Operation World
edition_note: ISBN is for the widely available 6th '21st Century Edition' (2001, co-authored with Jason Mandryk); the original 1974 edition was a 32-page self-published booklet predating this title's common ISBN use.

title: Chasing the Dragon: One Woman's Struggle Against the Darkness of Hong Kong's Drug Dens
edition_note: Current Chosen Books/Baker Publishing Group edition; co-written with Andrew Quicke. Originally published 1980 by Hodder & Stoughton.

title: I Love Idi Amin: The Story of Triumph Under Fire in the Midst of Suffering and Persecution in Uganda
An Account of the American Baptist Mission to the Burman Empire: In a Series of Letters, Addressed to a Gentleman in London
edition_note: Modern print-on-demand facsimile reprint (Forgotten Books); original work published 1823 in London by J. Butterworth & Son, predates the ISBN system.

title: The Restraining Hand: Captivity for Christ in China
edition_note: First published London, 1936 (reissued in revised form as 'The Guiding Hand' in 1973); predates the ISBN system. No verifiable ISBN was located for any print edition via WorldCat, AbeBooks, or Open Library — only out-of-print/antiquarian copies were found.

title: God's Dealings with Dora Yu: A Chinese Messenger of the Cross
edition_note: First published Shanghai: Mission Book Co., 1916 (reissued London: Morgan & Scott, 1928); predates the ISBN system. No verifiable ISBN was located via WorldCat or Open Library.
